basic_info.title: Super Mario World
basic_info.review: Super Mario World is a masterpiece of level design, offering tight controls and endless replayability through its secret worlds and cooperative mode.

alternative_names: Super Mario Advance 2: Super Mario World

play_today.details: The most accessible modern way to play with official Nintendo emulation. Includes all original content and is regularly updated.
The definitive original version with the best audio and visual quality. Requires authentic hardware or high-quality emulation.

play_today.platform: Super Nintendo Entertainment System (SNES) - Original Hardware
play_today.details: Play on authentic hardware with a flashcart like Super Everdrive or Super Powerpak for the best experience.

Super Mario World: Super Mario Advance 2 offers quality-of-life improvements including save-anywhere functionality and Luigi as a playable single-player character. Requires color restoration patch for authentic SNES visuals.

recommended_patches.name: SMA2 Color Restoration
recommended_patches.description: Restores original SNES color palette to the GBA version which had overly bright colors. Essential for authentic visual experience.

recommended_patches.name: SMA2 DX Improvement
recommended_patches.description: Enhancement hack with bug fixes and quality-of-life improvements over the original GBA release.

play_today.details: Not available on SNES Classic Edition. This platform is no longer in production.

The definitive original experience. While lacking modern QoL features, it offers the purest gameplay with the original soundtrack and no artificial slowdown. Best played via emulation on modern hardware for widescreen support, save states, and controller remapping. Community consensus favors this version for its authentic feel and lack of the GBA version's controversial changes.

recommended_patches.name: Super Mario World: QoL Improvement 2025
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive quality-of-life patch for the SNES version that adds autosave functionality, enables classic fireball mechanics, and includes music from Super Mario Maker 2.

recommended_patches.name: Super Mario World Redone 2.0
recommended_patches.description: A graphics and gameplay enhancement hack for the SNES version featuring completely overhauled visuals, new music tracks, and critical bug fixes while maintaining the original level design.

recommended_patches.name: Super Mario World Plus
recommended_patches.description: An improvement hack for the SNES version that separates player sprites, adds wall jumping, allows re-entry into switch palaces, and introduces new level themes and power-up blocks.

recommended_patches.name: SMW Practice Cart
recommended_patches.description: A utility patch for the SNES version designed for speedrunners, adding a practice mode with instant warp to any level and a timer overlay.

optimal_settings: Set internal resolution to 2x or 4x for crisp scaling
Enable 'NTSC' video mode for accurate color timing
Configure 'Save States' to auto-save every 5 minutes
Set 'Frame Skip' to 0 for smooth gameplay
Enable 'Audio Interpolation' for better sound quality
Use 'CRT Shader' for authentic retro visual experience
Set 'Internal Resolution' to 3x or 4x for high DPI displays
Enable 'Texture Filtering' (Bilinear) for smooth sprite scaling
Configure 'Input' to map controller buttons for modern gamepads

play_today.details: A convenient Virtual Console option that offers the original SNES experience with the added benefit of save states and online purchasing. While it lacks the graphical enhancements of modern emulators, it provides a legitimate way to play the game on a modern console without needing hardware modifications. The North American version is preferred for its official English localization.

The most portable option with official English localization and the ability to play on the go. While it offers the original SNES experience, it lacks the graphical enhancements and QoL features of modern emulators. The 3DS version is best for players who prioritize portability and convenience over graphical fidelity or additional features.

description.synopsis: Super Mario World follows Mario and Luigi as they travel to Dinosaur Land to rescue Princess Toadstool from Bowser. Along the way, they befriend Yoshi, a dinosaur who aids them in their quest. The game features expansive levels, hidden secrets, and cooperative gameplay, challenging players to explore every corner of the vibrant world.
key_features: Yoshi riding mechanics with unique abilities
Star Road warp zones for secret levels
Non-linear level progression with multiple paths
Hidden exits leading to bonus worlds
Dynamic camera scrolling and parallax backgrounds
Varied enemy types and boss battles
Item boxes and hidden blocks for exploration
legacy_and_impact: Super Mario World is widely regarded as one of the greatest video games of all time, defining the SNES era and establishing the blueprint for modern 2D platformers. Its innovative mechanics, such as Yoshi and the Star Road, influenced countless sequels and third-party titles, cementing its status as a cultural icon.
